race.comment: LAVANDULA (3) wasn't far away first up at Caulfield Heath in a stronger race despite finishing seventh and comes back in grade here. Beautifully placed and will be very hard to hold out with in form Billy Egan booked. FOREMMAKATE (4) is a promising type who scored at her last run before a break five months ago over 1200m at Murray Bridge. She's won a trial leading in, respecting the yard to bring her here fresh. EL PIBE DE ORO (2) was off a break at Caulfield and got home quite well. He loves this track having never missed the quinella in four starts and will be very hard to hold out late. ORLABENT (1) was close up at Donald latest and likes it here, respecting.
